records.m_Talk_ENG: Threat neutralized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Threat neutralized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Threat neutralized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it's time to end...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it's time to end...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it's time to end...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Have you... forgotten everything?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Have you... forgotten everything?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Have you... forgotten everything?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intentions of playing this stupid game with you, Shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intentions of playing this stupid game with you, Shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intentions of playing this stupid game with you, Shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a Doppelganger-type? Where is your original?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a Doppelganger-type? Where is your original?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a Doppelganger-type? Where is your original?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Ke, kekeke... Yes. It was supposed to end like this.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Ke, kekeke... Yes. It was supposed to end like this.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Ke, kekeke... Yes. It was supposed to end like this.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>You couldn't illuminate the darkness, and all we did was in vain.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>You couldn't illuminate the darkness, and all we did was in vain.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>You couldn't illuminate the darkness, and all we did was in vain.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>You proved it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>You proved it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>You proved it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Aditya.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Aditya.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Aditya.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's gone. If she had absorbed her original, she wouldn't have been this unstable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-absorb her original? The Shadow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doppelganger-type Shadows want to absorb their original human to become whole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because by doing so, they will make the original's strength and memories their own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, move hphphphphp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, move hphphphphp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, move hphphphphp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And hphpy hphp hphphpne's hpll.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And hphpy hphp hphphpne's hpll.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And hphpy hphp hphphpne's hpll.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you okay? Let's take a look at your wounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you okay? Let's take a look at your wounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you okay? Let's take a look at your wounds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body's fine. I was just taken aback... that the Shadow pretended to know who I was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body's fine. I was just taken aback... that the Shadow pretended to know who I was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body's fine. I was just taken aback... that the Shadow pretended to know who I was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that Shadow's original and I knew each other at one point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that Shadow's original and I knew each other at one point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that Shadow's original and I knew each other at one point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, let's get out of this city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, let's get out of this city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, let's get out of this city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that one's life is more important than one's wishes. I understand that it's dangerous here, so let's just go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that one's life is more important than one's wishes. I understand that it's dangerous here, so let's just go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that one's life is more important than one's wishes. I understand that it's dangerous here, so let's just go.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I can live without a father or my memories. But it's not worth trading my life
8g

I can live without a father or my memories. But it's not worth trading my life
8g

records.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa! The ground's shaking!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?! W-what the heck is that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?! W-what the heck is that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! W-what the heck is that?!
